calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Kevin P. Obrien, Aka Kevin O. O'Brien Individually, Dba Print Source, Dba Graphic Arts Association Should Not Be Held In Contempt
Off Calendar Sep-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff's Motion For Order To Show Cause Why Kevin P. O'Brien, AKA Kevin O. O'Brien Individually, DBA Print Source, DBA Graphic Arts Association Should Not Be Held In Contempt is granted. Plaintiff shall make personal service of the Order To Show Cause no later than September 29, 2006 for a hearing date of October 31, 2006 at 10:30 a.m. in Room 612. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Mo & Mo For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order & Turnover Order
Off Calendar May-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Molalla Holdings, Inc.'s Motion For Assignment of Rights, Restraining Order, and Turnover Order is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; & For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Apr-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Molalla Holdings, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
